introSection: Dizzy Mouse (German: Schwindlig Maus) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Brown track and supports. The supports on the lower parts are green. The ride used to feature red track and yellow supports.

fullText:
Dizzy Mouse (German: Schwindlig Maus) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria.



Brown track and supports. The supports on the lower parts are green. The ride used to feature red track and yellow supports.
